items.title: 4 Takeaways From Wisconsin's Dominant Big Ten Win Over Michigan State
items.description: Nick Boyd scored 29 points and shot 5-of-7 from 3-point range as Wisconsin trounced No. 10 Michigan State 92-71 on Friday night.

items.title: Tony Stewart on Racing NASCAR Trucks Again After Daytona Crash: 'Never Say Never'
items.description: Tony Stewart's return to NASCAR ended with a wreck in the Truck Series season opener at Daytona.
